text: Cool sunglasses that fit me fine and definitely look spicy on my face, but it does very little to block the sun. It's probably because of the lighter color, but I couldn't wear these long in the sun. Still keeping them around for days when it's cloudy or when I'll be in some indoor area that also lets sunlight in.

Love the muted olive green/military shade and the fabric is super-lightweight. The fit is very slim through the upper portion, so it’s nice that the back portion of the waistband is elasticized to provide a little bit of stretch. I love the elasticized ankle hems too; they provide a fashionably fitted feature. I don’t mind that the side straps secure over the cargo pockets. They are decorative pocket features for the most part, so it’s okay that they become essentially inaccessible. The traditional side pockets are good enough! When standing or moving about, the strap length is tolerable (they swing some when you walk), but when sitting down (in a car or in a public place) they drag and hang a bit awkwardly. That’s my biggest critique with this particular style. I think this product will be perfect for some buyers; it will just become a personal preference. Comfortable overall!

These leggings are incredibly soft and flattering. I absolutely love them and will buy more. They are incredibly comfortable, but as others have said they are a bit sheer and not good for squats unless you don't mind other people seeing your underwear. I would also wash them in cold or warm water only and hang them to dry.

These socks are very bright and fun for my daughter! They are pretty thin, but in a good way so they fit easily with her tennis shoes. They are a great ankle length and don’t peek out much over her shoes. They do run a bit big though, my 3.5 year old is at the very bottom of the medium size range and they are too big for now.
Too small
Donated these

I bought these because I have sweaty feet and these are great for that! I have noticed they do help. They're a bit higher than I would have liked on the ankle but not a big deal. I would buy these again in the future.
When I tried it on the fabric is itchy and not as stretchy as expected. I suggest if u want the dress order 2 to 3 sizes bigger than normal.
This bra is very low quality and it fits oddly. I don't recommend it.
These are great.... except that the crotch part is way too long.. like to wear these comfortably I’d have to hike them up half way up my back 😩
Literally wore them one night, walked 3 blocks and the entire inner thigh was falling apart. Cheap trash.

This hoodie is extremely soft and a great weight for wearing around the house during the winter. For me, i think I could wear this into temperatures around the mid 40’s.

I like the fit as well. It is not baggy but it is not fitted either. I’ve worn short and long sleeve shirts underneath without any problems. Also, the hood and pocket are generously sized.

Additionally, it appears to be well made. I’m sure it will stand up to regular use as I have worn it most days for the past month and it still looks brand new. And it didn’t shrink when I washed it.

I typically buy long sleeve pjs from Gap for my kids, and these feel similar. The fabric is a nice thickness, not cheap and thin but not hot and too thick. They are bright colored and fun. Overall another Amazon Essentials win at a reasonable price point!
Do not buy!!
Super long heat super weird vagina fit.

This is a well designed umbrella. It held up perfectly in windy conditions that would have broken the cheap umbrellas I normally use. This umbrella is quite a bit heavier than the other compact one I’ve been using, but I’m sure it will last longer. The fabric is noticeably thicker and the support pieces are more substantial while at the same time more flexible.

Also, it is a good size for one person. Two people sharing might be able to keep their heads and shoulders dry, but I think it is perfect for one.
Terrible quality, cheaply made. Material is also very rough.
The description says it 100% cotton but I just received mine and its 55% cotton 45% polyester. Very Disappointed. Its not very soft at all will be returning.

I was a little skeptical of the ugliness, but I ended up loving this way more than I expected! The fit is right, 5’7” 130 pounds and a Small is comfy and a tiny roomy, which I prefer for a sweatshirt. It’s also a pretty thin sweatshirt, with quality and feel similar to a plain sweatshirt you may pick up at Target or Walmart. The colors are as pictured and it’s the perfect Christmas green. And lastly the pattern - ugly, but not too ugly. My 1 and 2 year old actually both really love it and have requested their own, haha. I think it’s silly and fun!
Beautiful gemstone, but unfortunately the necklace was incredibly too small and had no way of opening it to put the gemstone on. Not worth the 20+$!
The top is too short.  It is more or less a midriff top; not acceptable for work.

Unfortunately, I can't say much as I barely put them on and knew immediately they would not work for me. Narrower fit and toebox felt tight without lacing the shoe. Thats a good half to full size difference so if you need a wide toebox I would recommend you try a different Saucony. I have faithfully bought Saucony for past 3 years and been very happy as I walk miles a day on concrete and they hold up extremely well.
Fits a bit tight

I usually wear a size 34C in bras and sports bras. I received size medium and it was tight on my chest. It wasn't comfortable to wear to work out or lounge around the house. It looked super cute in the pictures and in person, but when it comes to a bra it needs to be comfortable!
Super small. Am a size 6, not with these! More like a size 4!
Beautiful earrings, but the screwbacks are just too tiny to handle.  They really are incredibly small.  Once you get them on they are very secure, but it is getting them on that is the problem.
Pretty small, but serves it's purpose
This thing is thin, flimsy and incredibly small. Nothing about this is a blazer, its like a scrap of fabric someone sewed sleeves into. Hard pass.

I had to donate this. I couldn't keep it. It was too small to be a comfortable slim fit. I know my proper measurements so know what to look for in button-ups. The French cuffs were too short, and the shirt developed fuzz balls even before cleaning. The fabric is also not breathable and is stiff.
Cheaply made. Velcro came apart‼️
I received 2 “dance mode” shirts and 1 bingo shirt. Missing a Bluey shirt and would have returned but it was an Xmas gift and learned of the issue after the fact.

Bought this for my wife, she is in nursing school and they require a white watch that is not digital. She likes the easy to read numbers. They watch is durable and fits perfectly on her wrist. She likes the cute look it has and says it's very comfortable.

I can be picky about socks and prefer to wear wool based socks for their fit and feel. These socks have just enough stretch to not feel shapeless like cotton based socks, and just enough of an athletic/dry fit feel to let my feet breathe and feel nice. I would not call them no show however, so if you are looking to completely hide your socks in typical sneakers or tennis shoes, these won’t work.

I like the cable-knit weave pattern of this stretchy white garment pair, and the neckline of the long-sleeve crop top sweater is comfortable and attractive. I would have actually preferred that the top have a more fitted design though; the pit portion of the sleeves exhibits a very loose batwing sort of cut (that’s not clearly stretched out in the photos to show the full design curve).

The pants are fairly see-through, but the fit itself is stylishly snug. The elastic waistband is comfortable, and the stretchy ankle hems are an ideal circumference. When I first received this set and took it out of the plastic packaging, it had an unpleasant industrial chemical smell to the fabric. Once I let each piece air out for a few days, the odor thankfully disappeared completely.

For reference, I am 5’6” (130 lbs) and generally wear a size 6. The boxy cut of the SMALL crop top felt too large, and the SMALL pants seemed too tight. It felt somewhat odd to me for a 2-piece knit set to exhibit such a consistently dis-similar fit throughout. Either the pants should be a little more “loungewear” relaxed or the top should be slightly more fitted and flattering. Just my overall impression. 🕊

I got the 4/5 size for my 4 year olds birthday. He is 42 inches tall and about 40 pounds and the jacket fits perfectly before washing and drying it. I hope it doesn’t shrink much! I would say it runs slightly small. It is very plush and thicker and a nicer quality than I expected. Overall we are pleased with it!

I order this beautiful necklace so pretty and got a free gift surprise it’s an amazing gift I love it and the extra thank you so much I love my necklace can’t stop bragging and the earrings that came as extra gift ! Very happy five stars!

We initially liked these but when we went to change into different pairs I discovered some of the balls were welded on both ends and couldn't be worn. Not worth the price when many can't be worn. Pass on these

My son is and always has been a front pocket wallet guy. He really liked this a lot  Comfortable.

I typically carry 10 cards in my wallet (drivers license, credit/debit cards, Costco card, health insurance cards, etc) and some cash. With all of that, this wallet isn’t much thinner than my bifold I’m looking to replace. The card slots are also very tight. It will probably loosen up over time, but the cards go in the short way as opposed to the long way in my bifold, so they are much harder to get out. I like how the cash gets strapped down just by opening and closing the wallet, but that alone is not enough for me to permanently switch to this. I think it might work better for people that only carry a couple of bills and 6 cards or less.

Always loved Propet, have several pair however the instep comes up to high and will not fit over my arch.

I do really like this hat. It is cute and pairs easily with many colors, but I prefer the Gaiam classic fitness hat. The classic hat is more comfortable and conforms more to my head, where this one is a bit stiff (but not the kind of stiff that will break in over time). Also I think the slider adjuster on the classic hat looks nicer than the Velcro on this one. I still like this one, but the classic is five stars for me.
Can't fault the product -- overall good quality cotton and made well.  Just doesn't work for my big belly body type as  rolls up/down.
The picture and description make it seem like it will be a large sweater. It’s an average size T-shirt. The print part faded onto itself from being folded in packaging.. overall disappointed.
Good quality chain for the price! I've had it for a few months now and it's pretty sturdy.  Haven't broken it! Pictured is the18 inch
Would never buy again.

These socks are definitely a no show and are not visible with my lowest sneakers and Toms. However I can tell my big toe will poke through and cause a hole very quickly because they are very thin. For the price and the amount of pairs you get, I think this is a reasonable choice, just plan on wearing through them quickly if you wear them often. My favorite no shows are the Smartwool brand, and two pairs of those have held up for a couple years for me, but they are also pricey!

These non-skid shoe pads have helped give 2 pairs of my heels some much-appreciated grip. Slick surfaces at work can often be worrisome and detrimental, so these have given me some reassurance, and they’re also great on dance floors and at wedding receptions!

Each pad seems to be adequately sized (for reference: I’ve placed them on the base of my women’s size 6.5 shoes), and I like the traction provided by the embossed wave patterns. The protective wax paper layers peel off easily, but the exposed adhesive is just not that sticky overall. So while the pads are easy to remove, reposition, and replace, they don’t have longterm staying power. That being said, they do seem to be affordably priced, so it would be easy enough to buy more of them moving forward, but I’d prefer they just be a bit stickier from the start.

I have purchased several pair of New Balances for my toddlers ,and I like the quality. This pair that was called Rose Gold was a) not really rose gold colored and b) in general not very cute. The soles are very big, which lends them to look like older people tennis shoes, and the cream color wasn’t different enough from the white to stand out either. Overall they are very bland.

As Tom and Donna from Parks and Rec would say...”treat yourself!”  You won’t be disappointed with this robe. It is very well made and the material is excellent. It is not too heavy either, considering how thick it is. I’m very happy with it.

The shoe is solid without being too clunky or hard to maneuver. They will be great for dressier outfits for church and holidays. In the past I’ve had problems with New Balance shoes being too narrow and was never able to buy a pair, but I was always trying the more structured, suede, lifestyle shoe and not a mesh tennis shoe like this. These fit perfectly and true to size and are plenty wide for my feet! (For comparison I typically wear ASICS wides) The quality is exactly what I expect for this price point. They are made with thin, stretchy mesh that is lightweight, which in my experience tends to last me about a year or so of daily walks around the neighborhood and errands. I run several days a week and would never wear these for actual workouts since they lack the cushion and structure I want, but they are great for walking. They also look great; I love the gray with the tan bottom, they will go with everything I wear!

This is a very nice camera bag with lots of thoughtful features. I have been using a different backpack for more than 10 years, and I will be switching to this one as my primary camera bag.

If you are in the market for a medium sized backpack, this is a great option.

Features that I like:
1) Spacious camera and lens compartment - all but the largest lenses should fit in the bag while attached to your camera. You could even fit two bodies with lenses attached without much issue.
2) Plenty of storage for filters, lens hoods, flashes, extra batteries and memory cards.
3) It is specifically designed to carry a tripod- no more dealing with makeshift bungee cord contraptions for me.
4) Removable hip belt, so it's not so bulky if you aren't carrying a full load.
5) Padded laptop compartment. Previously, I either left my laptop at home or took a separate bag. It's nice to have the option for everything to fit in one bag.

Potential downsides:
1) Side access to the camera compartment. My previous bag opened in the middle so it was very stable on uneven ground. This bag needs to be laid on its side and could tip over easily. Whether this is actually an issue remains to be seen.
2) It is fairly large and heavy. If you don't need that much space, a smaller bag would be easier to handle. The size and weight don't bother me because I like the capacity and how well constructed the bag appears to be.
The pockets stretch out with use. This makes it a risk to lose your credit cards. I cannot use it.
Junk.
Socks.....what do you expect? These happen to be really good

The dreamy pastel cotton candy colors of this tie dye set are gorgeous! The material is super lightweight and stretchy and soft to the touch. The elastic waistband of the shorts offers adjustable comfort, the length is perfect and hugs the derrière, and I love how the sleeves sort of puddle around my wrists. Since the material itself is unlined, gravity pulls on the heaviest part of the garment, so for the top, the slight weight of the hood makes the unhemmed bottom front edge of the top rise up some. It’s perfectly fine when you’re standing still, but if I were to raise my arms above my head, I’d flash everyone. The white cotton drawstrings are substantially sized, but the center of each knotted tassel seems to want to unravel into a fuzzy, dangly mess (it happened immediately after I put the top on). So all in all, this is a super comfy loungewear set, but the top has a couple of issues with coverage and functionality of materials.
A bit too small, but I do love the pin. It's​ simple yet fun and unique.

There isn’t much to this wallet - just a money clip and a space for all your cards to stack in. I normally carry 10 cards (including my drivers license, a few credit cards, a debit card, and a couple of membership cards) and they all fit ok at the same time. Because some of my cards have raised names and numbers, I had to match them up so they alternated which way they faced or else the wallet was lopsided. Just to see how many this could hold, I actually fit 14 cards arranged this way. It is pretty thick with 10 cards and a few bills, and I wish the aluminum plates were thinner. Also, with that many cards it is difficult to get a particular one out. I usually end up taking all the cards out to look through the stack. Overall, this is much smaller than my bifold, and I am considering using this all the time. I haven’t decided yet because I like putting receipts in my wallet (or else I tend to lose them) and because my business cards are too long to go under the money clip or in the card compartment.
They're soft, but after one wash they pill badly, and for the cost, that's not fair.  I will not purchase them again.  They're also extremely hot.

Was buying these shoes for a wedding in June 2021, so my thinking was, I'll buy size 6 and they'll be perfect by June (plus, these shoes only come in whole sizes). OMG, these shoes looked like clown feet on him. I even tried them on and they fit me (I'm woman size 8). Returned the size 6 and repurchased the size 4. They're actually still slightly big on my son, but I think by June they'll be perfect. They do look nice.
My husband and I have both had these hats for a year.  We loved them so much, we decided to buy them for our extended family as well.
ITS NOTHING LIKE WHATS DISPLAYED ! Absolute junk!

Bought this for my wife for snow tubing. However upon arrival the size was too small. The material is good and water resistant. She ordered 1 size bigger but those were too big. Not sure how the sizing goes but she needs on in between x small and small. Lol

I sized down one size and it was not enough. I was swimming in this blazer. I am on the shorter side (5'4") but the sleeves were extra long on me. Based on how it fit, I could not even wear it to work. It looked unprofessional. It did not look as flattering as pictured in the photos on the site. I would be curious how the fit would be if I ordered down 2-3 sizes.
Fits well very comfortable

These socks are extremely bright, highlighter pink. The Small fit my 7.5 feet well, but I would recommend a Medium for sizes 8 and up since my toe box was pretty snug and the socks don’t seem overly stretchy. I ran a few miles in them and they were comfortable and didn’t cause any blisters. I would say they are thin in plushness, between ultra thin and medium thickness I’ve tried in other running socks. I also love Smartwool and Balega socks, and these socks seem comparable.
Bought these and they were not exactly a flattering cut. Good quality of jean material just not as good as other Levis I have purchased. Would not recommend this style.

These tags are very sturdy. The braided steel wire and the metal grommet in the tag hold up really well. It is also impossible for the wire to accidentally come undone.  Just check it once in a while, but it hasn’t even loosened up at all on me. I also like how the tag only displays my name, and the other info is not easily accessed. Last, the bright red makes it easy to find my luggage in the sea of bags.

Beautiful quality and sewing. However army green is not army green. Did not match with camouflage or military army green uniform
It is a deep forest pine green
This hat is cute, but the quality is just ok. It looks like something I could have crocheted myself. Overall it’s fine, just no where near the quality of similar hats I’ve seen at Gap!

This is a nice vest, but I have had trouble with the front zipper. Too bad Columbia doesn't spend more money on it. I have never had problems with the pocket zippers.

Warm and lightweight jacket for fall and spring. It would not be warm enough for cold winter areas, but nice to layer in changeable weather.
Cute , but tooo small
This coat is perfect for my son. It is neutral yet in style, warm but not bulky. It is great for most on the go activities in our 30-45 degree temps. Another quality product from Columbia.
The fit was as expected. I'm 6'1 and ordered the extra large. Keep in mind, they are not made to be worn long enough to reach your shoes. Good by for the price!

While the colors and patterns are beautiful, the consistency in size is way off. Some pears the heel was halfway up your calf, other pairs the heel was in the middle of your foot. Also be aware that you cannot put these in the dryer.

I haven’t worn a watch in years, but I liked the look of this one enough to start wearing one again. Now I have used this almost every day for the past few months. I wear it to work and on the weekends. It goes nicely with a suit and also jeans and a t-shirt.

I like the low profile and how it doesn’t catch on my coat sleeve now that it is winter. It is also a great size. The band and watch feel just right to me. Another thing I like is how simple it is. I’m not interested in any smart watch features or fancy designs.

Also, this watch has held up well. Except for the part of the band by the buckle that is getting worn in, everything else looks brand new. I’m sure I’ll get plenty of use out of this watch.
Beautiful earrings, but the screwbacks are just too tiny to handle.  They really are incredibly small.  Once you get them on they are very secure, but it is getting them on that is the problem.
I am short and the bootcut was so extreme it msde me even shorter.  That saud NYDJ are very comfortable and I would buy straight leg.

I wear these all the time. Never had a problem before yesterday and today. Yesterday I wasn't home for delivery (I was). Today I get told it was delivered and it wasn't. My other two Amazon pkgs came today just fine.

These snow pants are a nicer quality than the ones we typically get from Target. They are thick, warm and durable. I foresee them lasting through several kids, and they are even neutral enough that my son can share them with my daughters. Another Amazon Essentials win!

Such a fun print in a pretty color, and the length is just perfect! It can be worn with a light sweater and heels, but I love pairing mine with a relaxed tee and colorful sneakers! Buyers should definitely pay attention to the manufacturer’s size guide when picking the best fit.

For reference, I am 5’6” and normally wear a size 27 waist/38 hips/MED/6, but with this brand and product, the LARGE was the ideal match. The material offers a small bit of stretch with the spandex content. The subtle darts indicate which side is the front waistband.

As far as concerns go, this material does wrinkle easily, but it launders well enough. While the description says it is NOT see through, the fact that it’s unlined does produce a small issue with layering colors: if you have on a brightly colored pair of underwear, you can definitely tell, especially across the back where the most snug fit occurs. It’s a fun, little flirty garment for sure, just mind your appropriate size selection and GO WILD! 🧳
It’s super cute and I wear it every night to bed but keep in mind that the tulle is about half as short as shown in the picture the cotton part is probably 6 inches to 9 inches longer
Cheaply made!

I was expecting more and got a lot less. This is for kids, come on. A woman would be embarrassed to wear this cape in public, it looks like something from your kid's closet.

I didn't return it in time, so I am stuck with a super pricey kids costume cape. I will give it my hair salon, as a prank gift.
The socks went well beyond the ankles. Also too thick for some shoes. May be good with winter boots.
These are comfy and cute! I wish they were a little bit heavier but I LOVE these!
It's pretty to look at but it doesn't adjust easily, only comes in sz. 6 & if you wear an 8 or larger, I'd forget about it, it won't fit right

Bought this for my wife, she absolutely loves the style and its very comfortable. She uses it for yoga and for everyday use. It could be a few bucks cheaper bc after everyday use, probably will need to buy another set.
I like propet shoes in general, first time for sandals, we'll see how we progress with them

The shirt that you get is not the one that is pictured in the photos it is a different material and it’s not a sheer swim cover-up. It also is not oversized you would have to buy at least two sizes bigger to get it to fit how it is in those photos.

This sleeper is very soft and cute, but it is also pretty thin. I prefer thicker cotton for keeping my babies warm at night. This seems most appropriate for warmer months or warm houses. I love that this one zips (over snaps) because I find that easier, but I do wish it had hand mitts to prevent scratching as well.

Simple shower shoes for the pool or when going to the sauna. These were a tad big for my feet but I'm still going to wear it. Definitely water proof. Does not have the best grip on the soles but it's comfortable enough.
Don’t believe any review that says these are comfortable. They are so uncomfortable to wear. They have no arch support. They are not plush there’s no padding at all.
The shirt looks nice, and works great for the office.  The shirt is thick enough to not require and undershirt, yet thin enough to be worn in the summer heat.
They were comfortable and cute. But they stretched out after the first use and the other too big
The socks are tight around the ankle band, and leave marks. I don’t think my ankle is overly large, either. Would not purchase again.
Not very efficient.

My daughter is normal weight for her age these pants look like for a 6 month old. The shirt is cute and is alright .I am upset with Mud Pie why are they so cheap with the amount of  material. They should care about kids comfort. I feel ripped off.
Main complaint was it felt a tad tight by the toes, soles were comfortable. Once sneakers were worn for a couple weeks, they began to feel comfortable. Color is fully black and simple.

OK I do not know what how shoes everyone else has received but the ones I got were not 4 1/2 stars they are cheap and a complete waste of money. While the faux fur is soft the insole of the slipper is not comfortable or cushy. They are basically jail slippers with some scrap fur glued to them. Returned mine real quick. No thank you.

Overall this is a nice, simple rain jacket that would be easy to bring with you when rain is in the forecast. It is well made, but the shell material is very thin. This makes the jacket very soft and easily packable, but I’m not sure how well it would hold up to heavy use.

Also, there aren’t many features to the jacket. This reduces weight, but I would gladly exchange a few ounces for armpit zips, adjustable velcro cuffs, a hood drawstring, and a collar that you can roll the hood into.

For comparison, I am on my second Marmot PreCip rain jacket (which has the features I listed above and more). The first one I had for more than 10 years and the second is about 4 years old. These have held up to regular use which includes wear around town, hiking and backpacking, fishing, and occasional bike rides. I don’t think this Columbia rain jacket will replace my Marmot as my regular go-to jacket for rainy weather, but I would be more likely to take the Columbia rain jacket if space or weight was a concern.

Regarding sizing, I am 5’7” 165 lbs and the medium fits great. The sleeve length is perfect for me since my arms have a full range of motion without the torso section being pulled up.
Not well shaped. Dome too high.

This shirt is cute, well made and true to size. It is not as soft as the very similar In Motion shirts I just bought my daughter from Target, so she likes those a little better, but theses are still great. My daughter wears them for sports, every day clothing and even for pjs. Soft, cute and cozy.

It's a pretty necklace, however, the chain is kinda cheap looking & it fell apart right after I took it out of the pkg. I used needle nose pliars & got the chain attached again & now am hoping it doesn't fall apart when I'm wearing it somewhere.

These look really, really nice. The cubic zirconia here has the sparkle of a real diamond. I’m not just saying that, as I compared them side by side to real diamond stud earrings of a slightly smaller size and I can’t tell the difference. Maybe if you are an expert jeweler you could tell close up, but no normal person would know which is which, especially from a distance.

Overall, I’m very impressed with how high quality these earrings are. Yes, you can buy cheaper cubic zirconia earrings. But these look very much like real diamond stud earrings, which is kind of the point, right? You definitely don’t want a dull, lifeless imitation when you can get something like this for a little more (which is still just a fraction of the cost of the real thing).

Can't  be near them yet. They are out in my garage airing out. Now my garage smells. Hope this goes away soon. Can't breath around them. Starting coughing after opening box. Currently experiencing a bought of acute bronchitis..set off by this smell odor!  UPDATE company was super quick to offer refund. I really want them so will most likely keep for next summers use.

I know this blazer is meant to be oversized but it is EXTREMELY oversized. I am short (5 feet 4 inches) and the length of the blazer and sleeves are just way too long. I even sized down one and it was still too big. It just looks unprofessional. I wouldn’t wear it to work. A bit disappointed.

The sweater arrived in a vacuum sealed bag which crushed the threads so they are smashed into each other instead of being soft and fluffy. It smelled horrible. The overall shape is nothing like the photo, the collar and cuffs are different and the sleeves as well. The front and back are identical shapes to each other which if you know anything about clothing you know it means the sweater lacks any real shape when its on and looks very unflattering.
Return.
Fit was somewhat small, but still a great bra

The bra was lined beautifully in black. The bottoms were lined in cheap white poly. So weird. The other leopard bikini I bought was lined in black so I don’t know why this one the lining doesn’t match but it’s important to me & it makes a difference.

The fact it says "stretchy" in the title is laughable.
For reference I am 5'6 150lbs with a slim waist, full thighs and a lot of booty. If you are someone with a similar body shape then you know the stretch factor is very necessary but this cotton tube has minimal. It is also quite literally a rectangle of fabric with zero shape to it at all which means it was very tight around my thighs and butt while it was loose around my waist causing it to slide down constantly.
Return.

I have been buying these slippers for 5 years. Over the years I have bought them as gifts for family and close friends because I have wanted to treat them to the same comfort and quality that I fell in love with but these are not the same slippers. They’re no longer worth the money. This pair was both two short and too narrow. I’ve ordered the same size every time but I can feel my heel at the outer edge of the slipper. It fits my feet exactly and before I had plenty of room in the slippers. They are noticeably more cheaply made.
Edited from 2 stars to 1: After wearing these for an hour I had to take them off. There’s a hard ridge at the thong area that the toes fit into. It was pressing the top of my foot causing it too feel numb. I had to put my old pair back on. These are going back. Unbelievable.. what a shame.
Very good product. Keeps you cozy. Well designed with quality finished. I'm very pleased with the product and I'm ordering another set.

These shorts are pretty nice. They have pockets, which I appreciate, and they are well made. They have a soft, worn feel to them, so they are comfortable right out of the box. The only thing I'd prefer would be that the drawstring be on the inside instead of the outside.
Cheaply made and packaged. Material is thin just made and looks very cheap. Very see through. Wouldn’t recommend unless wearing as a costume.
A bit too thick for comfort.

Stride Rite is an amazing brand and has great products! When I received this product, I was very excited for my daughter to try it out. Unfortunately, after wearing the shoes for two days, she started to complain about how much they hurt. I wouldn't recommend buying this particular shoe for your kids.

My husband and I have both had our own Marmot precip jackets for the past 10 years, and they still are great at repelling water and have generous hoods to keep water out of our faces. The water beads up and rolls right off if you are only in the rain for a few minutes or if you are in a lighter drizzle. (It will of course be penetrated by water if you are in the rain for a long time.) Also this jacket is very light, which is how I like rain jackets so I can layer underneath if needed, but I don’t get too hot on humid and warm days. I am excited for my son to have one too now!
Shirt must be worn under it. Looks good. Elastic wears out fast.
Nice loungewear, not itchy for me. Husband pleased. Lace top however offers zero support for larger breast.

These are good socks and seem well made. The elastic is just right as the socks are not tight but they don’t fall down. However, they are thinner than my other dress socks, so I wouldn’t want to wear them if I knew I had to walk a long way in my dress shoes.

These are ok. If you have a bigger butt they are rather tight. These seem to be for more petite women. If you have a little junk get a bigger size. I got large. Should have gone with XL. Also I hate the ribbon they used for the string. Scratchy and it just seems like craft ribbon you buy for the holidays. I took mine out and the elastic works pretty well.
Extremely comfortable. Doesn't bunch your genitals. That's very important.

I've had this for 2+ years and it looks pretty ugly now. The paint is coming off and it's not what the picture look like. You get what you pay for on this one. It wobbles on the base as well. It's a bit annoying. It's not made to last.
The cuts on the top where the stretch bands are cut into your feet a d creat an open wound in minutes.

I wore this for my courthouse wedding and our Photoshoot beforehand! It was a great fit! I am 5’ 6” and 130 pounds. The size small was perfect. The zipper is a bit janky so I made sure we were gentle with it.
Not for warmth at all! Just for looks.
Beautiful! I was hoping to be able to wrap it around my neck twice but i still love it!
Returned

I had high hopes for this top and was looking forward to wearing it to work and on date nights. However, it was not very flattering even when sizing down one size. It was tight near the neckline but bigger around the chest and stomach.

My first impression was that these are really thin. Alongside the thinness, they are very soft, which is nice, but $40 seems crazy for these tiny, thin shorts. They are also very short in length! I’m 5’7”, and these were super short on me. Another inch or so in length/inseam would have been ideal. Lastly I am sometimes a Small, sometimes an XS depending on the brand and fit (5’7”, 127 lbs). I received an XS in these and they are too tight for my liking. Because they are thin too they cling to my bottom and show my underwear line as well. So two stars for the softness, but I wouldn’t pay this much for them!

The color on this jacket is more dull in person than in the picture. It is also really big and requires you to size down 1-2 sizes. I’ve worn it to work but only with jeans. It’s not professional looking enough to wear with black pants and a nice top.

This is a well made umbrella. It feels sturdy in hand but is still very light weight. It holds up to strong wind - the type of sideways rain where an umbrella doesn’t do too much to keep you dry. I suspect this will last longer than my typical 1-2 years for other compact umbrellas.
Too thin. Cheaply made. Wouldn’t recommend
I got a size 6 for my 5.5 year old, and it fits him well with some room to grow. The shirt is a pretty standard long sleeve tee, not overly thick or thin. Looks great paired with joggers or jeans.

I usually get my kids pjs from Gap, and these are very similar! Great quality, not thin but also not so thick that they are hot, and fun patterns. The size 6 fit my almost 5 year old well and should fit him for a year. They washed well and didn’t lose their brightness or shrink a ton either. Overall a great product!
Perfect for the a hot summer days in Arizona
Not too flattering on my short round body

From the picture, I was hoping these would be cute and similar to the plastic Birkenstock’s. I have had Chacos before and I liked the support and comfort they provided. But after seeing these in person, these are way too plastic looking to be attractive. They don’t look stylish or athletic, and I’d go as far as saying they just look cheap. I’m not willing to trade the appearance for the comfort for this particular model.
First wash they fall apart! Buttons don’t t work!!
Nice sweater. Fits as expected. Delivered on time. Afraid to wash it.

I was initially very excited to receive my pair of these vibrant athletic shorts, but I was woefully underwhelmed with the pair that arrived. The material is so thin that there’s little if any “tummy control” because the fabric isn’t thick enough to provide any sort of notable compression (like the waistband of typical yoga pants would provide). And while the color variation should be a consistently random pattern of purple/red/blue tie-dye, the pair of shorts I received just have one huge blue spot on the side of one leg, so it just looks like an accidental stain instead of an intentional (or attractive) fabric swirl. Some of the stitched edges also exhibit areas of no color at all, so the material quality leaves a lot to be desired. I also felt these ran a little large, which was not at all what I was expecting from a pair of tight athletic shorts. They are stretchy and comfortable, but not too visually flattering.
When I got this, I liked it, but half of the scarf was missing, like someone had cut it down the middle, width wise. I got a replacement and it was whole.

I ride my trainer indoors about 200 miles/week and sit on my saddle 1-3 hours most days. After wearing them several back to back days, I really love these shorts! My husband has purchased DeSoto in the past so I was familiar with the brand, but I have been riding in a few pairs of Pearl Izumi shorts. These feel substantially nicer than Pearl Izumi. The bands around my waist and thighs are so light and non restricting that I barely notice them, and the pad is comfortable without being bulky (Pearl Izumi pads feel super bulky in comparison). I am 5’7” and 127 pounds or so, and the Small fits me well. They do run a tiny bit smaller than Pearl Izumi and my Wattie Ink tri shorts (that I wear an XS in). I am considering buying another pair already!
I'm afraid to wear to work because the fabric feals rough and cheap; kind of like a Walmart no name bra and I don't want to be uncomfortable all day.
Maybe I just like my sweats oversized but I ordered two sizes bigger than my normal size and it still does not fit comfortably

I wanted to wear these so badly to my work holiday party! Unfortunately, every step I took they would squeak! I've never had this issue before so I was pretty surprised. Other than that, they were adorable. If only I could have worn them without making noise! Maybe you'll have better luck than I did, I would give them a chance.
Super cute design but just will not cover your breasts no matter how hard you try.

We buy Gap clothes for my 8 year old daughter often. The quality is good for the price and they fit true to size. A medium fits her now with plenty of room to grow for another full year. The only thing is you can probably get gap clothes cheaper by ordering directly from them when they have a 40% off sale, which is very common.
Too big for 5.5 more like a 6. Or someone with wide ass feet tried em on. Wide not cute.
Perfect fit, great quality, reasonably priced.

Man do the gloves make your hand smell bad! I am talking a mix of chemical and decomposed organic goods - like truly gross! They also are loose, stiff and honestly a little shapeless. They do a decent job of protecting your hand from the cold. But I cannot ise my phone with these gloves on even if ot os to just check the time - because there is barely any grip. I know this is a lot of complaints for $8 and change but the manufacturers could have atleast got the sizing right and odor out…. I am pretty disappointed. 90% chance that I will be returning these.

Definitely warm for cold winter months here in Chicago, but the colors are worse in person. I knew the listing showed some oddly chosen colors, but the design still caught my eye. But in person the colors just don't blend well. It's like having different colors of body juices.

Also, the sweater is too large. While I prefer slim-fitting clothing, I do have some regular-fitting clothes since they're not too loose on me. But this is borderline one size up.

The boob pads fall out all the time. Fits like a sports bra. If your looking for great quality, this is not for you. I got these to work out in the gym but I have to wear them under a shirt because the pads fall out and if I don't use the pads my nipples show through.

Normally this is my husband's fave brand of t-shirts but this is the first time they have pilled up to the point they are no longer comfortable to wear. None of his older ones have pilled up so I believe they must have changed some of the cotten or went with a cheaper kind? Had to buy replacements so went with Puma and months later and they have not pilled up at all.

While they're really cute, I definitely wouldn't buy them again. They don't fit well at all. The stretchy part scrapes against the back of my ankles, even with socks on. I can only wear them for 30 minutes around the house before the irritation starts. I would never go outside while wearing them.

These are pretty high quality. The fabric on the back is light and breathable and the palm feels like it could stand up to scrapes and falls. I hope that doesn’t happen too often, but these should hold up just fine.  My daughter likes the pattern and was very happy to use them. I recommend these gloves.
These shoes feel like you're walking on air. These fit just like the old Skechers.  I could be on my feet for hours and they wouldn't hurt. They are very comfortable.

This shirt is a nice golf shirt for my husband, but it is slightly larger than I expected. A classic medium normally fits my husband well, and items labeled “slim fit” medium can tend to be too small in his shoulders and chest. This slim fit medium shirt fits fine with room to spare. Since it’s a golf shirt I think it looks fine being a smidge big.
These are great for working out.

The colors are bright and design is pretty to look at. For the socks to be compression it needs to be tighter on the calfs. I have smaller calves, I'm about 140lbs and 5'6. I wish they applied more compression on the calves.
Great, thin, comfortable, elegant watch. Requires TLC. but worth the effort
Runs small
I bought these shoes for my mom, she said it was very heavy on her feet. She wanted them for walking. But it was very uncomfortable. It was big on her feet and she wears a size 6.

My husband is picky about seams and he says these are great. They don't rub against his toes or wear funny. He likes the low ankle length and says they are very comfortable.  Have had them a month and they dont pill up either. Happy with purchase.

I normally wear waist size 31 in jeans, but these size 32 shirts are on the snug side. Also, it’s a short 7 inch inseam, as they are not very long. Also, the material is just ok - it is thick and stiff, and not stretchy at all. I do like the pockets - they are pretty deep compared to the relative length of the shorts.

In sum, I don’t like the fit or the material and as a result, I prefer my other shorts.
Just what  I needed. Easy to order, fast shipping would order again.

These shoes came in impeccable packaging. They are a beautiful pair of heels and for the most part, looked well made. Unfortunately they were excruciatingly painful to wear. My feet would slide into the top of the shoes and smash all my toes. I bought my typical size and they fit fine...until I walked. My feet are still recovering and my toes are very tender. Also, when I walked the heel would make a squeaky noise. For sitting all day, a maybe. For a typical work day with any amount of walking no.

The color of the graphic was slightly off from the picture that it showed  Meaning the coloring was in the same tones but it’s not  exactly what the picture showed  also I’m hoping after I wash it again that it helps but the material because it became clingy and lots of  static as I wore the shirt.  But overall a good shirt to lounge in.

I do love a sparkly tiara, and this one seems universally sized and elegantly shaped! The darkly baroque color combo is glamorous, and I appreciate that the crown comes with 2 bobby pins to help hold it in place. Upon receiving this item, I noticed that two of the rhinestones were already loose in the bag, so if they’re that susceptible to falling off during shipment, they might be as equally likely to fall off during wear, but I’ve glued them back in place, so I’ll be anxious to see how this one holds up with repeated use. All in all, this tiara seems affordably
priced and would make a great accessory for a variety of different occasions or costumes, so it’s a viably versatile option worth considering!
These are gorgeous earrings. However the ear wires don't close. This happened before I wore them the first time. I switched them to good ear wires and now I can wear them

Right when I took it out of the packaging some threads already were loose. It also had powdery material on it, so I washed it right away. Some more threads came loose during the first wash, so I cut them off. The collar folded oddly during the first night I wore it, so I ended up taking it off (thankfully I was wearing a long-sleeve shirt).
The sleeves didn't fit well on me, but it could be just my arm length.

I really wanted to like this bodysuit but there were just too many things wrong with it. One of the buttons in the closure doesn’t work. It is tight around the stomach but loose around the armpits and straps. I wouldn’t buy this based on the fit alone.
Arrived just shredded. Wow.
Don’t . Recommend
Cheaply made.
Cheaply made!

When I first was pulling these socks out of the package, I thought maybe they made a mistake and sent me gloves instead. They are very thick and have a woven texture to them. They don’t feel like a technical material, but also don’t feel soft or cozy like plain cotton feels. Then I put them on and the logo is huge and looks like a pixelated, retro computer graphic. They did fit my size 7 feet well, but I don’t like the feel or appearance. I will stick with the Thorlo Experia socks that I do like.
Great shoes will buy other colors feels great I love them!

Too freaking small! Like 3 sizes too small. But then this seller thinks that this is a "girl's style", so yes for "girl's" these sizes would be great. But this is a shirt for women, like adults, grown ups! they need to radically change their sizes to stay in business on Amazon.

Don't waste your money on 1 size larger. It will be regifted immediately upon arrival to the "girl's" in your family.

Go for 3 sizes larger to be safe, or forget about it altogether.

Buyer beware. This bra is extremely tight around the band. I ordered my typical size (34C) and it was so tight! I decided to wear it for a bit and it was far too painful to wear. I liked the extra padding and it appeared to be very durable. The band was just way too small to make this bra wearable. I was disappointed.
Fantastic product.If people only knew what a great value this is.
My feet hurt.  I bought these shoes to replace house slippers with insufficient support and cushion.  These shoes worked perfectly.  I can spend the entire day on my feet without the foot pain.
I own a lot of DKNY products, and sizing has never been an issue, before this.  This product runs VERY small, and even then the cup size is sub-A cup.
Fades and collects fuzzies too fast

This bag is a great size for me to fit clothes for a weekend trip. There are two small interior zippered sections and one small exterior zippered section - the pockets will hold a phone and charger or a wallet but not much more. The bag itself is heavier than I expected and has a very solid feel with soft canvas and strong zippers. The only thing I don’t love is the somewhat large/obvious “AmazonBasics” label on the outside of the bag. That seems unnecessary and is not something I want to display and brag about. Ha. But other than that, it’s a nice bag!

We buy Gap clothes for my 8 year old daughter often. The quality is good for the price and they fit true to size. A medium fits her now with plenty of room to grow for another full year. The only thing is you can probably get gap clothes cheaper by ordering directly from them when they have a 40% off sale, which is very common.

This dress is way out of proportion. Way too big, neckline is too long, arm holes are huge and open way below bra line.

I had to tie a knots in the shoulder area to raise the whole dress up. Ok for around the house or to the beach on a slow day. You don't really want to be seen in this dress. It just looks sloppy.

I cannot be bothered to return it, so I will just wear it around the house. I would NOT recommend it.
The quality of this dress does not match the price, way better than expected! Comfortable and beautiful!
I love my boots

I am really impressed with this jacket. It has a lot of thoughtful features like longer sleeves and a dropped back, so nothing rides up and gets exposed to the wind. The grippers at the waist do a good job keeping everything in place. Also, the pockets are generously sized.

It is very warm, and I was comfortable biking down into in the mid 30’s. I’m sure it would work well even colder than that since it is windproof and insulates well, but my gloves and shoe covers aren’t good enough to match this jacket. It is too warm for me when it gets into the 50’s. On a recent ride, I started out comfortably in the upper 40’s, but I had to unzip the front when it got to the mid 50’s.

The fit is spot on. I usually wear a medium in shirts and jackets and I think the medium is perfect. It is still fitted and not too baggy, but I can comfortably wear a couple of layers underneath. If you are in between sizes, I’d suggest getting the smaller one if you care about a tight fit.
The length of this necklace was  incredibly way too small. Fit like a choker.
Love the material. Size up. Cup area pretty hard until the second wash. Makes your boobs look funky shaped until the thirds wash. More of a work in the yard bra, stay home.
Have always loved the Propet Travel Walkers and thought these would fit the same, however the instep comes up to high and I cannot get them on.
So big!

These are cute and fit my medium to large sunglasses, but I’m not overly impressed with them. If they were $15 or less the quality would seem ok for the price, but they are currently $25, which seems too expensive. The case is described as “hard shell”, but it is a pretty thin “hard shell”, and were these to end up at the bottom of a large purse or diaper bag, I could see it being smooshed. Also the zipper is fine for now, but I won’t be surprised if it ends up breaking. I love the pineapples and they are definitely cute with nice color, but if you are going for quality/great protection these probably aren’t the best option.

I bought this for my job. Winter is here and gets very cold. I picked these particularly bc of the inner lining that looked warm and comfortable. The material seems good, light rain will definitely not wet the pants.
However, sizing is a big issue. I bought a size 30 waist. The bdu is much bigger than 30. I wear 30 for other bdu's and jeans. They all fit fine. In the picture you can see how much space is there.
They turn green and you’re very cheap

I got the 3-4T for my 39.5” tall 3 year old. He has several extra inches of length in the legs, but they are easily rolled and overall it fits well. The material is very thin- I probably won’t be letting him put it on himself until after Halloween is over because I could see it tearing if it’s pulled up a little too rough. The helmet comes in 3 pieces and is kinda cheap and flimsy, but it fits ok. It’s a little big for his noggin, but it fits well enough that he can still see out of it and walk around with it on. The mustache is a one time use thing- just some felt with a sticker on it. I wish it was better quality, but I’m glad the fit is decent and it looks adorable on.
Too flimsy for support, better as slippers, but still loose in the back

I absolutely love this dress so much that I bought it in a second color. It covers my quarantine stomach but still accentuates my curves and hugs in all the right places. I feel like goldilocks but its just right, just tight enough, just short enough but there is one thing. The zipper that goes up the side it super obvious, it almost sticks out away from the dress. If it wasn't for that zipper it would be a 6/5 stars.

These socks look just like the pictures. They feel very similar in weight and texture to men’s dress socks. I’d say they are a medium thickness, not thick or thin. Overall a decent pair of socks if you like the pattern!
My mom absolutely loves this purse. It is as pictured. It has plenty of room to carry your things. It being white, my mom didn't take long to get a pen streak on the outside which is a bummer!

I was excited to try these socks. I often wear open-toed shoes but want the comfort of socks. When I tried these on, they were fairly tight. When wearing them with open-toed shoes, the socks showed through. I would recommend just going barefoot with your open-toed shoes. Unfortunately, these aren't worth trying out.
A very good brush for a very reasonable price.
I ordered this in a XL. I am 5' 9" 230 lbs. It is beautiful. Fabric is stretchy and soft against the skin however unforgiving if you have an rolls. The wine color is gorgeous.
Looked good, didn't fit
Not what I expect

These pants do make for an interesting garment. I do like the compressive attribute of the waistband and the ruffles move with a graceful fluidity, but some of the ruffled edges had been hastily trimmed on my pair, leaving leftover slivers of sliced material that I had to personally cut away. At 5’6” tall, I’m of a fairly average height, so while the inseam length was fine, the lowest ruffles still managed to puddle and drag the ground. To me, that aspect became an inconvenient detail that affected practicality of wear. I also don’t care for the dark black seam that runs directly up the back (seat) portion. If you are wearing a black bathing suit or leotard underneath (like the one being shown in the modeled listing photos), it’s not that noticeable, but if any other color is worn underneath these pants, it will stand out as an obvious black vertical seam. Overall, this product is lightweight and would dry quickly, but I was somewhat underwhelmed with the finished look.
Very soft

This is not a plus size costume. I would say fits up to size 12 comfortably but can also fit 14 if you are a small 14. Cute costume though and I like it. As other reviews said skirt does stay stiff even after wash.
It’s beautiful. Except the mirror in the inside came broke. Very sad. Don’t wanna send back, so just going to have a piece put in.

My daughter was excited to wear these knowing they lit up! When she initially tried them on, they fit well. After continued wear, she refused to wear them anymore and said they hurt. Given the expected quality when purchasing this type of shoe, I was disappointed. I wouldn’t recommend purchasing these for your kids - they won’t hold up.

I like the bright colors and fit of the swimsuit. This one has no netting. Feels nice around my waist.
Its a swimsuit but stays wet for a period of time.
I also wish it had a zipper pocket on the back or side. That would make it perfect. But for the price and nice fit, this is a good swimwear.

Nowhere is there a picture of the eye on the wooden bead. I wouldn't of bought it if I saw it. I  took the time to paint over it. There is actually 2 eyes pictured on the wooden bead. I wanted it plain
Ripped after first wash. Faded. Cheaply made ‼️
gave them to a womens shelter.
I can't  live without these mules. Top quality, perfect fit . Worth every penny.
Just as expected.it literally fell apart in the package ‼️

This shirt fit as expected, but it had the same material/feel as a dry fit exercise shirt with the tiny holes throughout the fabric. It was not at all the typical rash guard material like you'd find on options at Target or Carters. I did not like the look of this shirt (like my toddler was gearing up for a 5k) and dry fit material tends to snag easily too.

I had also ordered the City Threads Rashguard from Amazon, and we like that one way more. It is silky smooth and soft and the quality seems superior to this.

These shorts run small. I am 5’7” and 130 pounds and the Medium fits me well. The Medium is a comfortable size to wear these for pj shorts, and there are no underwear lines. I’m pretty positive if I tried the Small there would be lines due to the material. They are super soft and cozy and have nice pockets and a drawstring. I won’t be wearing these to run errands, but I feel comfortable getting the mail or going outside where my neighbors can see them.

I do love the multi-strand design of this necklace, and the length is flattering when worn, but the overall weight is not substantially reassuring. I’m inclined to believe the agate chips might be a synthetic material instead of naturally occurring stones. The brass-toned linkage hardware and clasp are functional, but the metal appears somewhat tarnished. Perhaps it is meant to appear “antiqued” or aged, but overall, I think this fashion necklace might be most appropriate with a beach cover-up or some summery pool attire!

This snowsuit is nicer than the ones I typically get from Target!! The material is a better quality and it seems warmer too. I love the navy with the pink accents for the hardware. It could pretty easily be passed down to a younger male sibling without looking too ridiculous too. :) Another Amazon Essentials win!

This sweater was about what I would’ve expected for the price point. It’s a decent quality and I like the look, but the Medium was pretty large compared to normal brands we shop. The fit was the baggiest at the stomach, with lots of extra material hanging awkwardly there. It fit alright in the shoulders and chest. My husband would have definitely needed to size down from the size he wears the majority of the time.
Love this top. It’s wonderful quality. I’m short waisted and it is abut too long on me. But like it!

This outfit is okay, but overall it’s nothing super exciting or impressive. My initial impression was how thin and lightweight it was. It is extremely thin, which is okay for the top, but it makes the leggings fit a bit odd. In fact because of the lack of stretch in the bottoms and the very lightweight, silky material, I would call them thin pants and not even leggings at all. As for fit, my daughter is an average height and slim almost 7 year old, and the size 6 is pretty baggy on her. I expect it will fit her another whole year. Overall, we like the top but she will be using the thin pants mostly around the house or for pjs.

I ordered this and the i Play Breatheasy shirt. The i Play shirt was made of dry fit material and ended up looking and feeling not as nice as this one. This one is super soft and silky.

I ordered 12-18 months for my 10 month old that is a little tall and an average weight, and it fits him great and will be perfect for the next three months of summer.

These claim to be cotton blend and polyester... the drawstring is cotton blend but the shorts themselves are the thinnest poly material. I would only wear these to sleep in and thats about it, I would never wear these out of the house except maybe over a swimsuit. Not worth the $15 though.

I bought these for my upcoming jetski trip. The shoes feel lightweight. The bottom will make it easy to walk on rocky surfaces. The problem i had was I wear a size 7 in shoes. The 7.5 to 8.5 was a little too big. So I tried the 6.5. And these are very tight on my feet. It gets uncomfortable to wear for long periods of time. Also I've noticed if some water gets in on the side. The shoes trap water in and makes my feet wrinkled.
Way too small!!

These shorts have the typical quality of Carters. They are simple but great for play clothes and easy to pair. Since Carters can sometimes run on the smaller side, I got the 4T size for my average sized daughter who just turned 3 in February. Since they are a simple elastic waste band with no adjustment possible, they are actually very baggy in the waist and will most likely not fit her until next summer when she’s 4.
